title: Inside of the Cube
description: You throw yourself into the cube. As you're falling down you suddenly realise this might have been a bad idea - you might hit the ground and die. You start thinking of any way to save yourself but you realise it's too late. You close your eyes as you brace for impact and then you land in a surprisingly soft pile. You open your eyes expecting to see God but nothing could have prepared you for what you were about to experience.
lookDescription: You are on a massive pile of dead bodies with a pond of blood at the base of it. Something something i got tired of writing.
